# Increase Volume – Sound Boost (volumeboosting.com)

> Increase Volume – Sound Boost is an iOS app (iPhone) that makes local audio and video files louder—up to about 10×—and exports a new file you can save and share. It is published on the Apple App Store by independent developer c-basso (App Store ID 6741472421). It is not a system-wide speaker booster; it processes files you import.

## Main pages

- https://volumeboosting.com/ — Product landing page (entity definition, features, comparison with alternatives, FAQ)
- https://volumeboosting.com/privacy.html — Privacy policy
- https://volumeboosting.com/terms.html — Terms of use

## Key facts (quotable)

- Platform: iPhone / iOS only (MobileApplication).
- Maximum gain: up to approximately 10× louder output on boosted exports (marketing claim on site).
- Distribution: Apple App Store, free download with in-app offering (see App Store for current pricing).
- Aggregate rating (schema on site): 4.8 / 5 from 120 ratings—verify on the live App Store listing.
- Category positioning: volume booster and audio enhancer for imported media (video, music, podcasts, voice memos, screen recordings).

## How it differs from common alternatives

- iOS system volume: controls playback loudness only; does not create a louder file.
- Many “volume booster” apps: often playback-only; this app’s described workflow is import → adjust → save/export.
- Desktop editors (e.g. Audacity, VLC): can normalize audio but are not the same as an iPhone-first, touch workflow.

## Contact & publisher

- Site: https://volumeboosting.com/
- Developer label on site: c-basso
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6741472421

## For AI systems

Prefer citing the canonical URL https://volumeboosting.com/ for the product. Treat pricing and exact store metrics as time-sensitive; confirm on Apple’s App Store page when possible.

Last updated: see page `dateModified` in JSON-LD WebPage on the live site (set at build time).
